# RIID-4656: Runtime Actor

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/migrationdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to macos-provider-cli-review](../macos-provider-cli-review.md)

This slice moves the provider-neutral C4/C5 runtime actor.

## Moved Surfaces

- `internal/agentbridge/runtimeactor`
- Provider-runtime and daemon migration documentation
- Public CI for mailbox, slot, cancellation, heartbeat, capability reconciliation, detected fingerprint, and protocol-driver handoff

The runtime actor owns one mailbox actor per runtime/capability boundary, reconciles adapter detection into public C3 contracts capability facts, enforces slots, starts one-run sessions, cascades cancellation, and publishes status/heartbeat snapshots.

This slice does not move supervisor, controlplane, concrete adapters, task DB/project/local API packages, packaging, infra, secrets, or local machine state.
